title: REEDSPORT MEDICAL CLINIC AND SPECIALTY CLINIC - 211info
text: REEDSPORT MEDICAL CLINIC AND LUH SPECIALTY CLINIC REEDSPORT MEDICAL CLINIC AND SPECIALTY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides surgical, gynecological, and orthopedic services, as well as access to a registered dietician. Also offers specialty care in dermatology, ear, nose, and throat (ENT), and podiatry. 385 Ranch Road Reedsport, OR 97467 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm. Specialty care visits are by appointment only and hours vary. Email (541) 271-2119 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Primary Medical Clinic (541) 271-2119 Specialty Clinic (541) 271-6330 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service. OHP (Open Card and Trillium) and Medicare accepted. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Reedsport, Winchester Bay, Lakeside, Gardiner, and Scottsburg SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The building has two entrances. The first entrance is to the LUHD Reedsport Medical Clinic. The second entrance is for the Specialty Clinic where hours vary, are by appointment only, and are set by each visiting specialty service provider. Services: Nutrition Assessment Services Nutrition Education Obstetrics/Gynecology Podiatry/Foot Care If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
